metadata.title: DIDI.BIKE — Data-Integrated Dynamic Intelligence | Precision Cycling Sensor
metadata.description: DIDI.BIKE Sensor — Professional cycling telemetry hardware for aerodynamic profiling, posture analysis, and power measurement. 14g ultra-light, 100Hz sampling, <10ms latency.
metadata.ogDescription: A 14g seat post sensor that measures aerodynamic drag (CdA) in real time — no wind tunnel needed. 6-axis IMU at 100Hz, ±0.1° accuracy, 120h battery. Streams to Garmin, Wahoo, Strava, TrainingPeaks. $299 vs $15,000+ motion capture setups.

hero.subtitle: 14 grams. 100Hz sample rate. Sub-10ms latency. Real-time aerodynamic profiling, posture analysis, and pedaling dynamics — all from a single sensor on your seat post.

items.title: Aerodynamic Profiling
items.desc: Measure your drag coefficient (CdA) in real time as you ride — no wind tunnel required. Optimize position on the road and save 15–20W at race pace.

items.title: Posture Correction
items.desc: Track pelvic stability and body angles at ±0.1° precision. Spot asymmetries before they become injuries — the data your bike fitter wishes they had.

items.title: Universal Compatibility
items.desc: ANT+ and Bluetooth LE 5.0 broadcast to every major head unit and platform. Garmin, Wahoo, Strava, TrainingPeaks — no proprietary app needed.

sensor.label: Hardware
sensor.title: The Sensor
sensor.desc: Engineered for precision. Built for endurance. Lab-grade biomechanics data, anywhere you ride.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.title: Data You Can Act On
ecosystem.desc: Open protocol. No vendor lock-in. Plug into any workflow.
ecosystem.integrationDesc: No proprietary app required. Broadcasts directly to all major head units and platforms.
ecosystem.devApiDesc: Access raw 6-axis IMU data. Build custom analytics with our open REST API.

business.label: For Business
business.title: Built for Scale
business.desc: Integration solutions for manufacturers, professional fitters, and research teams.
business.readyDesc: Contact our business development team for custom solutions.

plans.title: OEM Integration
plans.desc: Pre-install the sensor into your frames for factory-calibrated performance data out of the box.

plans.title: Bike Fitting Pro
plans.desc: Replace expensive motion-capture rigs with millimeter-accurate sensor data for faster, more precise fits.

plans.title: Enterprise API
plans.desc: Historical data, team analytics, and custom algorithm tools for cycling teams and research labs.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Questions, partnerships, or technical support — we're here.
contact.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.disclaimer: DIDI.BIKE — an acronym for "Data-Integrated Dynamic Intelligence" — is an independent sports technology brand with no affiliation, association, or endorsement by any ride-hailing, transportation, or mobility company. DIDI.BIKE is strictly a cycling telemetry hardware manufacturer specializing in sensor technology for aerodynamic profiling and biomechanics analysis.
